judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes the required first action of rinsing the eyes under running water for at least 15 minutes with eyelids open, followed by consulting an eye specialist. It preserves the do-not-stop-rinsing warning and the escalation to an eye specialist after rinsing starts. The Bangla wording is clear and usable.
